---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for LifeQuest
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

A brief, one-line description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What user need does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature in detail. How should it work?

## User Story

As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## Mockups / References

Add any wireframes, sketches, or reference apps if available.

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocking release)
- [ ] High (important for v1)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (future consideration)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, related issues, or dependencies.
